monthly_seasonality.description: Should monthly seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality, `None` will automatically detect seasonality.

periods.description: Time periods (in units of `time_grain`) to predict into the future

time_grain.description: Time grain used to specify time period increments in prediction. Supports [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations) durations.

weekly_seasonality.description: Should weekly seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality, `None` will automatically detect seasonality.

yearly_seasonality.description: Should yearly seasonality be applied. An integer value will specify Fourier order of seasonality, `None` will automatically detect seasonality.
